title: red-green-refactor TDD
invocation_hint: Invoke SKI-PRO-999 (red-green-refactor) and produce a TDD plan for the task below. Use `skill_invoke(SKI-PRO-999)` first to load the skill, then apply it.
task_description: Add a function `slugify(text: &str) -> String` to a Rust crate that converts arbitrary text into a URL-safe slug (lowercase, ASCII only, hyphen separators, collapse runs of separators, trim leading/trailing hyphens). The crate already has `cargo test` configured.
